ground_truth_fix: The bounds check here is not correct. You are checking if you can access up to struct ethhdr of bytes, but you should check for struct ethhdr + struct iphdr since you will be reading from the iphdr next.

candidate_repairs.patch_hint: Add bounds check: if (data + offset + size <= data_end)
